# Monster Vault

> Monster Energy can collection manager — catalog, photograph, and track value of ~1800 cans worldwide.

## What this app does
- Full CRUD for a Monster Energy can collection with photo management (Cloudinary)
- Interactive world map showing collection coverage across 79 countries
- Value calculator with combinable filters and grouped subtotals
- Statistics dashboard with timeline and Top 10 by value
- Public sharing via read-only links
- PWA: installable, works offline

## Tech stack
- Backend: Spring Boot 3.3 / Java 17, MongoDB Atlas, JWT auth, Docker on Render
- Frontend: Vanilla JS PWA (single-page app)
- API: REST at /api/cans (public read) and /api/auth (login/refresh/logout)

## Public endpoints
- GET / — landing page
- GET /map.html — interactive world map
- GET /api/cans — full collection (JSON)
- GET /share/{id} — shareable can detail with social preview

## Repository
https://github.com/MarioRanieri/monster-vault-server
